name: National Institutes of Health
description: Supports biomedical and health-related research across foundational and translational domains.

name: National Science Foundation
description: Funds basic science and engineering research, including emerging interdisciplinary fields.

name: Department of Energy Office of Science
description: Supports energy, materials, and computational research relevant to national priorities.

name: Department of Defense Research Programs
description: Supports mission-oriented technology and advanced engineering efforts.

name: Advanced Research Projects Agency for Health
description: Supports high-impact health research programs with translational potential.
